name: IRC_TN_JOB_APP_BID_INFO
description: This is the table for storing job applications bid information on Talent Network.

columns.Name: JOB_APP_BID_INFO
columns.Comments: Primary Key of the table. System generated.

columns.Name: SUBSCRIBER_ID
columns.Comments: To store the subscriber id. Foreign Key to IRC_TN_SUBSCRIBERS.

columns.Name: JOB_APP_ID
columns.Comments: To store the job app id. Foreign Key to IRC_TN_JOB_APPLICATIONS.

columns.Name: BID_RATE
columns.Comments: Stores the bid rate for this job application.

columns.Name: BID_CURRENCY_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the currency code for the bid for this job application as a lookup code.

columns.Name: PAY_BASIS_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the pay frequency as a lookup code.

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Stores comments about this job application bid information.

columns.Name: REF_FA_SUBMISSION_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the reference submission id that is provided with this job application bid information.

columns.Name: AGENCY_PROFILE_URL
columns.Comments: Stores the agency provided profile url of the candidate for this job application bid information.

columns.Name: DISPLAY_RATE
columns.Comments: Stores the formatted rate information of this job application bid information.

columns.Name: OBJECT_STATUS
columns.Comments: Indicates the status of the object.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
